titles.B03: What are your height (cm) and weight (kg)?
titles.B04: Which region do you live in?
titles.B05: What is your current physiological stage?
titles.L01: How many hours do you sleep per day on average?
titles.L02: How is your sleep onset and nighttime sleep?
titles.L03: What are your smoking and drinking habits?
titles.L04: How often and how intensely do you exercise each week?
titles.L05: How long are you sedentary each day, including screen time?
titles.L06: How are your recent memory and bone conditions?
titles.L07: Have you recently had any fall risk?
titles.L08: How are your menstrual cycle and premenstrual discomfort?
titles.L09: How much outdoor activity and snacking do you have each day?
titles.E01: How much staple food (rice/noodles/whole grains) do you eat each day?
titles.E02: How much and how many kinds of vegetables do you eat each day?
titles.E03: How much and how many kinds of fruit do you eat each day?
titles.E04: How much meat and eggs (lean meat/eggs/fish/shrimp) do you eat each week?
titles.E05: How much dairy (milk/yogurt/cheese) do you consume each day?
titles.E06: How picky is your child with complementary foods or regular meals?
titles.E07: How are your chewing ability and daily water intake?
titles.E09: Do you regularly supplement folic acid or iron?
titles.H01: Do you have any of the following underlying conditions? (Multiple choice)
titles.H02: Have you recently had fatigue, dizziness, dry eyes, or similar discomfort?
titles.H03: How are your child's recent growth, development, and immunity?
titles.H04: How are your recent vision/hearing and chronic disease control?
titles.H05: Are you currently taking medication or nutritional supplements?
titles.H06: Do you have a history of major illness?
titles.G01: What are your core health goals?

descriptions.E08: (Can be linked to risk prompts for users with hypertension, diabetes, and related conditions.)
descriptions.H01: Multi-select scoring: the lowest score is used.
descriptions.H05: Used for later drug interaction reminders.
descriptions.G01: Multiple selections allowed; used for recommendation priority.

L02.bad_one: Either difficulty falling asleep or frequent waking
L02.ok_some: Easy to fall asleep, occasional waking
L02.good: Fall asleep easily and sleep through the night

L03.often_one: Regularly do one of the two

L04.high_5plus: 5+ times, moderate to high intensity (gym/ball sports)

L06.bad_both: Noticeable memory decline + frequent bone pain
L06.bad_one: Either memory decline or bone pain
L06.ok_some: Memory is normal, occasional bone pain
L06.good: Memory is normal, no bone pain

L08.bad_one: Either irregular cycle or severe premenstrual discomfort

L09.bad_both: Less than 1 hour outdoors + frequent snacks
L09.bad_one: Either less than 1 hour outdoors or frequent snacks
L09.good: More than 2 hours outdoors, few or no snacks

E06.severe: Very picky, only a few foods accepted

E07.bad_one: Either chewing is average or water is under 800 ml
E07.good: Chewing is normal, more than 1500 ml water

E08.heavy_one: Heavy in one of oil, salt, or sugar

H03.bad_both: Slow growth + two or more colds each month
H03.bad_one: Either slow growth or two or more colds each month
H03.ok: Normal growth, one cold per month
H03.good: Normal growth, rarely catches a cold

H04.bad_both: Clear vision/hearing decline + poor disease control
H04.bad_one: Either decline or only average control
H04.ok: Mild decline, disease is well controlled
